With Noloco, you get:

 A point-and-click app builder

 A clean UI out of the box, with full control over layout and branding [...] Noloco provides a visual, intuitive experience while still offering powerful logic and data handling. Unlike Retool, it doesn’t require developers to get started, making it a better fit for teams who need scalable solutions without complexity.

Noloco, Glide, and Softr are top choices. Noloco is especially well-suited for non-developers looking to build secure, scalable internal tools, CRMs, and portals without writing code.

results.title: The 12 Best Retool Alternatives to Build Faster in 2026
results.content:
### 12. UI Bakery

UI Bakery is a low-code Retool alternative designed for developers and teams who want to rapidly build internal tools, customer portals, admin panels, dashboards, and vendor apps. It features a responsive drag-and-drop builder offering over 75 customizable components.

The platform’s flexibility enables you to create complex interfaces for both desktop and mobile environments, while supporting custom business logic operations with Python. UI Bakery seamlessly integrates with 30+ native data sources, including SQL and NoSQL databases, REST, OpenAPI, and GraphQL APIs. [...] ### What Is the Best Alternative to Retool?

If you’re looking for a no-code option, Blaze is a popular option. We built Blaze to offer the power, customization, security, and scalability that companies need to develop enterprise workflow automations.

If you want a low-code Retool alternative, ToolJet is a good choice. ToolJet, on the other hand, offers open-source flexibility combined with low-code customization, making it a shortlist-worthy option for tech-savvy users.

### Is Retool Open-Source?

No, Retool is not. If you’re looking for an open-source Retool competitor, try Appsmith or Jet Admin.

### Can Non-Developers Use Retool Alternatives? [...] The best alternatives are Blaze because it offers no-code simplicity for building unlimited apps, Appsmith because it’s open-source and developer-friendly, and Softr for quickly creating a frontend from pre-existing data.

results.title: 7 best Retool alternatives I've tested in 2026
results.content:
And finally (arguably, most importantly):

As with most software (and things in life), not all the Retool alternatives I tested live up to all of these questions and features. The best one for you depends on your needs, from critical must-haves to most-desired features.

## 7 Retool alternatives and competitors in 2026

I tested seven of the top Retool alternatives in depth, including AI agent platforms, open-source AI platforms, no-code app builders, and enterprise/low-code tools. Here they are:

You’re smart and you’re reading the Gumloop blog so you know I’m going to talk about Gumloop first. In my opinion, Gumloop can do everything Retool can, easier and faster, especially for non-technical users. But read my full reviews below to find the best Retool alternative for you. [...] Budibase is a unique Retool alternative because it offers the ability to self-host on all plans, even for free. Whether you just want ownership of your security or are in a regulated industry, Budibase is an excellent choice for using with your own infrastructure.

While recent, Budibase’s AI assistance features let you build apps or make changes with natural language processing, although this is currently only available on cloud hosted plans.

Budibase editor

The template library and drag-and-drop app creator make it easy to get started, though Retool offers more UI customization options. You can add custom JavaScript, although both Retool and Appsmith offer more JavaScript-friendly capabilities.

Key features:

#### How Budibase compares to Retool [...] If you need something like Retool but that’s truly no code and easy to use, or have a specific wishlist item Retool can’t fulfill, AI-native, 100% free, self-hostable, stronger governance, etc. You’re in the right place.

I purposely chose Retool alternatives that excel at different things so there’s something for everybody on this list.

First, a quick peek into how I chose these seven Retool alternatives before I get into the deep reviews.

## What to look for in a Retool alternative

Retool is a solid choice for creating custom internal tools, especially if those include databases. But maybe you’re trying to save money compared to Retool’s per end user pricing, or just want an AI-native workflow instead.

Here’s what I was thinking about when testing Retool alternatives:

results.title: The Best Retool Alternatives in 2026: Open-Source and Paid ...
results.content:
### What is the best free Retool alternative?

For teams comfortable with managing their own infrastructure, open source platforms like Appsmith, Budibase, and ToolJet are the best free Retool alternatives. You can download and deploy them on your own servers for free with full functionality for unlimited users.

### Why are companies looking for Retool alternatives?

The main reasons include high per user pricing that doesn’t scale well, vendor lock in due to its closed source nature, a desire for greater UI and frontend customization, and the need for more flexible deployment options like self hosting on any plan.

### Can I build customer facing portals with these tools? [...] ### Microsoft Power Apps: The Enterprise Go To

If your organization is heavily invested in the Microsoft ecosystem, Power Apps is a natural retool alternative. It integrates seamlessly with Office 365, Azure, and Dynamics 365. Connectivity is a major strength, with hundreds of pre built connectors.

The platform’s adoption has been explosive, with over 700% more Power Apps in active use in early 2023 compared to just two years prior. It’s a proprietary, subscription based service, but for enterprises that need deep Microsoft integration and robust security, it’s a proven and scalable choice.

### Budibase: For Speed and Customization [...] Total Design Freedom: Fine tune every aspect of your app’s UI visually, or even import your own custom Vue.js components.
 No Lock In: Export your code and self host your application on your own infrastructure for complete autonomy and security. This is a level of freedom many platforms don’t offer.
 Scalable and Enterprise Ready: Trusted by organizations like PwC, WeWeb is built to handle complex, production grade applications.
 No Per User Fees: The pricing model doesn’t penalize you for growing your user base, a common pain point with other platforms.

If Retool felt too constraining, WeWeb provides a future proof alternative that combines the speed of no code with the power of code. Ready to build without limits? Try WeWeb for free.
